name: airship-mcp
description: Airship SDK development server — push notifications, channel management, SDK migration, and build verification.
long_description: Provides tools for sending push notifications, managing audience segments and channels, verifying iOS/Android builds, guiding SDK migrations, and accessing Airship skills as prompts.

bearer_token.title: Bearer Token
bearer_token.description: Recommended. From go.airship.com > Settings > APIs & Integrations. Provide this or Master Secret (or both).

master_secret.title: Master Secret
master_secret.description: Your Airship master secret. Required for some endpoints. Provide this or Bearer Token (or both).

region.title: Region
region.description: Your Airship region: us or eu

tools.name: start
tools.description: Main router for Airship SDK tasks

tools.name: send_push_to_tag
tools.description: Send push notification to a tag

tools.name: send_push_to_channel
tools.description: Send push notification to a specific channel

tools.name: send_custom_push
tools.description: Send a custom push notification payload

tools.name: validate_push_payload
tools.description: Validate a push payload without sending

tools.name: lookup_channel
tools.description: Look up a channel by ID

tools.name: get_channel_tags
tools.description: List all tags on a channel

tools.name: get_channel_attributes
tools.description: Get custom attributes for a channel

tools.name: lookup_named_user
tools.description: Look up a named user and their channels

tools.name: get_segment_info
tools.description: Get details for a specific segment

tools.name: verify_build
tools.description: Build and verify an iOS or Android project

tools.name: start_migration
tools.description: Start an interactive SDK migration wizard

tools.name: migrate_sdk
tools.description: Run an SDK migration for a specific version range
